arts.ttl: Scottish Premiership star admits Celtic troubles as he shares why Bhoys are on 'different level'
arts.sum: Speaking to The Scotsman, Hibernian summer signing Ekpiteta has admitted he didn’t realise how good Celtic were and has expanded on why the experience was a wake-up call within his expectations of Scottish football. Others seem to have sat up and taken notice of Celtic, with Hibernian defender Marvin Ekpiteta recounting his own difficulties against the reigning champions back in August.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers picks out Ross County danger man who will be motivated to shine vs Celtic
arts.sum: Celtic travel to face Ross County in Dingwall this weekend, and Brendan Rodgers has picked out one man from the home side that the Bhoys need to be wary of on Sunday. Speaking ahead of Celtic’s travel to face Ross County, Rodgers singled out Ross County striker Ronan Hale as a particular threat the Bhoys will need to watch out for on Sunday amid his bright start to life in Scotland.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers delivers remarkable response to Celtic's thrashing by Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Celtic saw a 17-match winning run ended in Germany in midweek as they were brutally demolished by Borussia Dortmund 7-1 at the Westfalenstadion

arts.ttl: 8 Brendan Rodgers Celtic presser headlines as defiant boss responds to Champions League critics
arts.sum: It's great to dream and for critics to look and think what the score is going to be and what it might be, but as a manager and coach when you’re in the professional game, at times against the Champions League finalists you might expect that you might lose. Psychologically, it’s a very difficult place to be when you’re playing a high-level opponent, but that’s where I commend the players.

arts.ttl: Steve Clarke's Scotland problem is set to benefit Celtic star and Brendan Rodgers' depth
arts.sum: Taking an unusual slant, Everton manager Sean Dyche’s comments on Nathan Patterson’s prolonged injury problems at Goodison Park could offer some pivotal clues surrounding Ralston’s opportunity to star on the international stage while Celtic take a break. Lately, 67 Hail Hail covered why injury issues and the intense fixture ahead could lead to Brendan Rodgers’ comments on Ralston’s Celtic future coming true.

arts.ttl: Defiant Brendan Rodgers points Celtic cynics to familiar motto to answer 'naive' Champions League charge
arts.sum: The Hoops look to get back on track against Ross County after being demolished in Dortmund

arts.ttl: Everything Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers said in Friday TV interview as he addresses criticism
arts.sum: Rodgers was awarded with the manager of the month award in September and was asked about the current direction of his team, responding: “The path we’ve been on as a team and as a club has been really, really good. Celtic manager Brendan Rodgers has been speaking to the media ahead of Sunday’s Scottish Premiership match against Ross County.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers tells Celtic Euro snipers 'I'm no dreamer' but boss WON'T change gameplan for anyone
arts.sum: Rodgers says he plans to stick to his guns no matter what happens

arts.ttl: Celtic's Super Sunday heats up nicely as Aberdeen get confident and Rangers get thrashed
arts.sum: Not only are the Bhoys featured in the live Sky Sports lunchtime kick-off away to Ross County, but the undefeated Aberdeen take on Hearts at Pittodrie before rivals Rangers host St Johnstone live on Premier Sports at night. Coupled with tricky tests for Celtic and Rangers, Aberdeen see it as a potentially huge day for them in all respects.

arts.ttl: Liam Shaw only has good things to say about Celtic and the fans after exit ends tough spell
arts.sum: Now 23, Shaw has admitted he craved regular first-team football, but also lauded the Celtic experience on and off the pitch in an interview with his new club. Liam Shaw says Celtic improved him as a player
